title: Polymorphic Occultism
description: Adds Polymorph recipe-conflict compatibility to Occultism mod.
body:
[![Support me by hosting a minecraft server on Wabbanode ! (prices start as low as 1.49$USD / month) ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/101574d2252d501a181cc771473884e9d4b81a63.png)](https://wabbanode.com/affiliate/amine)

Polymorphic Occultism

If this mod helped you, consider supporting me [ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/aminoquiz) <3 An add-on mod providing [Polymorph](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/polymorph) support for the Storage Controller crafting terminal from [Occultism](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/occultism), adding Polymorph's recipe selection button to the terminal in order to choose between conflicting crafting recipes instead of being forced to work with only one of these conflicting recipes within Occultism's storage system. When a group of ingredients matches more than one recipe, a button will appear above the output slot. Clicking it shows a list of all possible results, selecting one changes the crafting output to match. Polymorph will remember the last selection as long as the ingredients don't change, allowing repeated crafting actions on the same selection. **Required mods:** [Occultism](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/occultism) and [Polymorph](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/polymorph) *** If you want to help keep these mods going, check my ko-fi : [https://ko-fi.com/aminoquiz](https://ko-fi.com/aminoquiz), or consider hosting a server on wabbanode with my code below (prices starts from 1.49 USD/month) ! Thank you <3 [![Support me by hosting a minecraft server on Wabbanode ! (prices start as low as 1.49$USD / month)](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1493170/description_2156c264-8c2e-4898-a3b3-a6a997a30ce7.png)](https://wabbanode.com/affiliate/amine)
